body:
**Scope.** Tier-2 from #146 (M3.8) was not built. Implement a real single-node kill-and-reconstruct test on a live node (NVMe/fsync, container) that kills a D server and verifies reconstruction.

**Definition of done**
- [ ] off-Check **harness code** exists and is exercised by tests (not inert scaffolding gated behind `WYRD_TIER2`)
- [ ] a **privileged CI job** (real node — NVMe/fsync, docker) runs it green, outside unprivileged `xtask ci` (ADR-0016)
- [ ] a killed node's affected chunks return to full redundancy in distinct failure domains; crash mid-repair leaves collectable garbage, never corruption

**Refs:** follow-on to #146 (M3.8, only Tier-0 landed); ADR-0016; proposal 0005 §reconstruction / §repair-vs-serve.

milestone.title: M3 — Custodians
milestone.description: The self-maintaining durability plane (L4): GC, scrub, reconstruction, rebalance + durability telemetry. Makes single-zone trustworthy; gates the Step-2 release. Plan: proposal 0005.

title: M3.10 — Tier-2 single-node kill-and-reconstruct fault test — harness + privileged CI job
